metadata.title: feat: Parallel Task Orchestrator for large-scale migrations (Issue #1783)
metadata.author: rysweet

risk_assessment.justification: High risk: massive changeset (11,337 lines, 39 files), core infrastructure changes, 84 days old (likely needs rebase), complex orchestration system. Draft status and high comment count (9) suggest ongoing work/issues.

priority_assessment.justification: Medium priority: valuable core feature but severely stale (84 days), likely needs significant rebase/conflict resolution. Draft status and age suggest it may need resurrection decision.

key_changes: IssueParser: Parse GitHub issues and extract sub-issues
AgentDeployer: Deploy Task agents to isolated worktrees

next_steps: If resurrect: check for merge conflicts with main
Verify test suite still passes after rebase
Check if requirements/architecture changed in 84 days
Consider fresh implementation if conflicts too severe
